class TemperatureConverter:
    # Read-write auto-property with default
    property celsius: float = 0.0
    
    # Init-only auto-property - can be set in __init__ but read-only afterwards
    property init precision: int
    
    # Read-only auto-property with computed initial value
    property get scale_count: int = 3
    
    def __init__(self, precision: int):
        self.precision = precision
    
    property get fahrenheit(self) -> float:
        return (self.celsius * 9.0 / 5.0) + 32.0
    
    property get kelvin(self) -> float:
        return self.celsius + 273.15
    
    def set_celsius(self, value: float) -> None:
        self.celsius = value
